choices.name: Frost Nova
choices.description: Unlocks Frost Nova — AoE crowd control that damages and slows nearby enemies.

choices.name: Fireball
choices.description: Unlocks Fireball — high single-target ranged damage.

choices.name: Healing Light
choices.description: Unlocks Healing Light — heal yourself or an ally. Entry to the cleric path.

choices.name: Arcane Sight
choices.description: Unlocks Arcane Sight — reveal all enemies in the current room.

choices.name: Mana Drain
choices.description: Unlocks Mana Drain — deal damage and restore 8 mana on hit.

choices.name: Purify
choices.description: Unlocks Purify — remove all debuffs + heal. Requires Healing Light.

choices.name: Portal
choices.description: Unlocks Portal — exit the dungeon immediately with all loot. 1 use per run.

choices.name: Meteor Strike
choices.description: Unlocks Meteor Strike — massive AoE nuke. Requires Fireball.

choices.name: Restoration
choices.description: Unlocks Restoration — massive heal + defense buff. Requires Purify.
